description:
Spec: docs/cps-in-clif.md §2.4.

Work: module-init emits one static @halt_stub closure per compiled module (zero captures; code points to a small stub that calls fz_task_exit and traps). Lowering uses `global_value @halt_stub` everywhere the initial k of a spawned task is needed.

Acceptance: any compiled module exports exactly one @halt_stub; spawned tasks halt by tail-calling it.
title: fz-cps.2: halt continuation singleton
